title: Vanilla with a Cherry on Top
description: A modpack that only uses vanilla features so that people on vanilla clients can join servers made with this modpack!
body:
Vanilla With A Cherry On Top aims to change as much of vanilla as possible without adding any new blocks or items. All mods here are either client side or only use vanilla blocks and items.

Features:

Terralith!

Performence Improvments!

QOL changes!

And custom structures for YOU to explore!
